name: fishTDX
short_description: Buy towers and discover new islands as you prepare your defenses against waves of fish! Unlock new towers and affixes after each round with new play styles and new synergies. Build your defenses and experiment to create the ultimate fishing machine!
detailed_description:
There are over 80 towers in the game with new updates planned to add tons of new content to the game. As you play, you will unlock more packs to introduce new synergies, challenges, and combinations of towers that will unlock entirely new ways to take down the hordes of fish!



During each wave you will discover heaps of new content like plot types, artifacts, enemies, and much more! As you discover more, you'll unlock different packs with new towers and synergies to discover. There are currently 5+ packs in the game with unique towers and combinations, as well as unique affixes that can be placed on towers to enhance their strength.



Not only are there heaps of towers, but there's tons of affixes to enhance your towers, and plots to develop with unique effects and artifacts that can enhance your towers even further. There's different enemies, elite enemies, difficulties, and a huge collection to discover with secret synergies and special content.

HOW TO WISHLIST


Press the 'add to wishlist' button to add the game to your wishlist. Adding the game to your wishlist will add it to the wishlist you see at the top right of the screen so you can see that you've added it to your wishlist! Hope that was helpful!
